title: hieracium bifidum subsp. canitiosum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. canitiosum, also known as the wood hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium bifidum subsp. canitiosum include its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Hieracium bifidum subsp. canitiosum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used in infusions, salves, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
